title: Makeup Artists, Theatrical and Performance
description: Apply makeup to performers to reflect period, setting, and situation of their role.

tasks.text: Clean supplies such as makeup brushes.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Duplicate work precisely to replicate characters' appearances on a daily basis.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Apply makeup to enhance or alter the appearance of people appearing in productions such as movies.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Analyze a script, noting events that affect each character's appearance, so that plans can be made for each scene.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Alter or maintain makeup during productions as necessary to compensate for lighting changes or to achieve continuity of effect.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Confer with stage or motion picture officials and performers to determine desired effects.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Requisition or acquire needed materials for special effects, including wigs, beards, and special cosmetics.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Study production information, such as character descriptions, period settings, and situations, to determine makeup requirements.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Establish budgets, and work within budgetary limits.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Select desired makeup shades from stock, or mix oil, grease, and coloring to achieve specific color effects.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Write makeup sheets and take photos to document specific looks and the products used to achieve the looks.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Assess performers' skin type to ensure that makeup will not cause break-outs or skin irritations.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Attach prostheses to performers and apply makeup to create special features or effects, such as scars, aging, or illness.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Examine sketches, photographs, and plaster models to obtain desired character image depiction.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Cleanse and tone the skin to prepare it for makeup application.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Evaluate environmental characteristics, such as venue size and lighting plans, to determine makeup requirements.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Provide performers with makeup removal assistance after performances have been completed.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Design rubber or plastic prostheses that can be used to change performers' appearances.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Create character drawings or models, based upon independent research, to augment period production files.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Demonstrate products to clients, and provide instruction in makeup application.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Advise hairdressers on the hairstyles required for character parts.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Wash and reset wigs.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
